attributes.title: [SOC] Control Status Header
[SOC] Control Status (latest per control)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Control Status (latest)", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}, "aggs": [{"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "control.id.keyword", "orderBy": "_key", "order": "asc", "size": 50, "customLabel": "Control"}}, {"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "control.status.keyword", "aggregate": "concat", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "customLabel": "Latest status"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "soc2.tsc.keyword", "aggregate": "concat", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "customLabel": "TSC"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "control.detail.keyword", "aggregate": "concat", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "customLabel": "Detail (latest)"}}]}

attributes.visState: {"title": "Status mix", "type": "pie", "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "isDonut": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "control.status.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "customLabel": "Status"}}]}
